subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Parsons, spoken on 1912-04-25
subcodes.first_line: It is very difficult to have one like me as a guest. Every guest and traveler has a limited number of friends with whom he makes special dates for visits, but you are forced all day long to be the entertainer of all.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نحو مسافر و مهمان خیلی زحمت دارد و باید خانه را بگذاری و فرار کنی
